svg.title: EMMA Critique-Refinement Loop
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how EMMA agents assess, plan, execute, critique, and self-correct their output before emitting a verified result.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the Goal + Spec input in EMMA?')
sendPrompt('What does the Assess stage check in EMMA?')
sendPrompt('How does the Plan stage work in EMMA?')
sendPrompt('What happens during Execute in EMMA?')
sendPrompt('How does the Critic Agent evaluate output in EMMA?')
sendPrompt('What happens when EMMA emits a verified output?')
sendPrompt('What is the Experience Manifold in EMMA?')
sendPrompt('How does EMMA generate a correction patch?')
sendPrompt('What happens when EMMA raises a clarification request?')
